name: Fortune Telling Crystal Ball Gelatine Mold (Kh)
recipeInstructions:
Follow the directions on the package of gelatin, substituting 4 cups of clear soda pop for liquid. Pour into the mold and refrigerate until it achieves the consistency of an egg white.
Meanwhile, make the fortunes by cutting 4" x 6" strips of different colored construction paper, each 1/2". Write different fortunes on each strip. Roll tightly in plastic wrap. Insert fortunes into the mold, dispersing them throughout. Make sure to have enough for everyone. Let guests spoon their fortune and serving into their own dish.
